messages.body:
Here is my Amazing daily "Stocktwits" report 1/2:  
 
$STAK $HUBC $DEVS $ANY $LASE 
 
STAK Price 2.03 My post last night "Good close of daily candle. 1.4 - 1.55 is acting as key support zone. Next key level to test 2.5 - 2.7." It made a MASSIVE move to 3.89  
 
HUBC Price 0.54 My post last night "Initially alerted at 0.32. Still looking good on 4hours chart with key support zone at 0.35 - 0.39. It can test 0.69 - 0.73 zone again." It made a nice move to 0.8182  
 
DEVS Price 0.56 My post last night "Initially alerted at 0.25. Still looking good on daily chart. Key support zone at 0.37 - 0.41. Next key level to test 0.72 - 0.76." It made a MASSIVE move to 0.9176  
 
ANY Price 5.14 My post was "Good close of daily candle. 3.5 - 3.8 is acting as key support zone. Next key level to test 5.85 - 6.15" It hit our desired zone, went till 6.19  
 
LASE Price 2.96. My post last night "Looking strong on 4hours chart. Key support zone at 1.8 - 2.05. Next key level to test 3.55 - 3.75." It made a nice move to 4.49

messages.body:
$GOAI EVA Live (Nasdaq: GOAI) reported a transformational 2025: revenue of $17,037,328, up 82.6% year-over-year, and a swing to net income of $8,127,313 versus a $3,753,268 loss in 2024. Active clients rose 25% and operating expenses fell to 51.75% of revenue. 
 
Management attributed results to higher advertiser spending, improved operating efficiencies, and platform scalability as the company positions for AI-driven product rollouts in 2026. https://www.stocktitan.net/news/GOAI/eva-live-inc-s-revenues-surge-82-6-to-17m-as-company-swings-to-8-1m-z8k2c0w913nf.html $ABVX $DEVS

data.text:
EVA Live (Nasdaq: GOAI) reported a transformational 2025: revenue of $17,037,328, up 82.6% year-over-year, and a swing to net income of $8,127,313 versus a $3,753,268 loss in 2024. Active clients rose 25% and operating expenses fell to 51.75% of revenue. 
 
Management attributed results to higher advertiser spending, improved operating efficiencies, and platform scalability as the company positions for AI-driven product rollouts in 2026.

data.title: From loss to $8.1M profit: EVA Live says advertisers spent more
data.description: Active clients rose 25% while operating costs fell to 51.75% of revenue from 139.92%, showing how the ad-tech platform scaled in 2025.
